description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-copy-button

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-copy-button/`
**NOTE:** No index.ts ‚Äî may be incomplete/from PR 175 rescue.

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Existence Check** ‚Äî Complete implementation? If not, document gaps.
2. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Button styling, success state icon/color. Dark mode.
3. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. Button label ("Copy to clipboard"). Success announcement (aria-live).
4. **Functionality** ‚Äî Copy to clipboard API. Success/error feedback. Timeout reset. Custom copy content via property or slot.
5. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
6. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. Icon swap animation. CSS Parts.
7. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî Must be documented if shipping.
8. **Tests** ‚Äî Clipboard API mock. Success state. Timeout.
9. **Storybook** ‚Äî Default. Custom content. Success feedback.
10. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Twig-friendly.

### Deliverable
If incomplete: document gaps. If complete: full audit. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-copy-button
